title: malaxis oligantha
intro: Malaxis oligantha, also known as the small-flowered malaxis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Malaxis oligantha include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Malaxis oligantha is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
